event: View of Potemkin Street in St. Petersburg
description: A panoramic urban view of a wide street in St. Petersburg flanked by neoclassical buildings. On the right, a building with arched porticos and classical columns dominates. On the left, lower buildings and walls extend into the distance. Trees line portions of the street. Small figures and horse-drawn carriages populate the scene. A large building with a dome is visible in the far distance. The sky is expansive with clouds. The palette is warm with golden-toned architecture under a blue and gray sky.
